intro: This Product User Manual (PUM) serves as a comprehensive guide for users of the Copernicus High-Resolution Layer Small Landscape Features (HRL SLF) product, focusing on the 2021 reference year. It details the product's specifications, characteristics and usage, targeting a broad audience including operational users and decision-makers. The manual covers the evolution of the SLF portfolio, user requirements, application areas, and the methodology employed to derive the HRL SLF products. The technical focus includes woody vegetation mapping, change detection, and data processing techniques using very high-resolution imagery and Sentinel-2 data.
